{{Quote|Yes, he's a prince, our jailer, isn't he?|Luke Skywalker, regarding Grammel|<ref name="Splinter of the Mind's Eye" />}}
[[Captain-Supervisor]] '''Grammel''' was an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] officer who commanded the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation on [[Mimban/Legends|Circarpous V]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|It is only I, Governor, a humble servant of the Emperor, Captain-Supervisor Grammel. I am in charge of the secret mining colony on Circarpous V.|Grammel, to Governor Essada|<ref name="Splinter of the Mind's Eye" />}}
[[File:Grammel.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Captain-Supervisor Grammel]]
Grammel earned a reputation as a ruthless, sadistic officer, routinely [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] prisoners, whether he needed to or not.

When he learned of the existence of the [[Kaiburr crystal]] and the presence of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], he informed [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bin Essada/Legends|Bin Essada]], who in turn informed [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

However, the two prisoners escaped from custody with the help of two [[Yuzzem]], [[Hin]] and [[Kee (Yuzzem)|Kee]], and their fellow [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Halla]]. During the chaos, Grammel was injured in an explosion that burned a significant portion of his face, his right arm having to be "re-formed" and his ear damaged. Upon Darth Vader's arrival, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] was disappointed with Grammel over his failure to prevent them from escaping. Worse, Vader took over the command of Grammel's troops.

[[File:GrammelDeath.jpg|thumb|250px|Grammel is killed by Darth Vader]]
Grammel was ordered to seize the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leaders, a task he failed to complete. Despite—or perhaps as a result of—his pleas and excuses, Grammel was executed by Darth Vader for his incompetence.
